description_long: This is a modern, spacious bungalow set within a walled property featuring a large driveway, landscaped gardens, and a tennis court. The main building has a flat roof with geometric skylights and extensive floor-to-ceiling windows, providing a sleek, contemporary appearance. The front facade includes a prominent entryway flanked by palm trees and decorative shrubs, while the rear opens to a patio area with a swimming pool and outdoor seating. The property also includes a multi-car garage attached to the main structure and a well-maintained lawn surrounding the tennis court. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white tones, with blue accents and glass elements. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a pool, tennis court, and landscaped gardens within a walled property. The design features clean lines, light colors, and extensive outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped entry with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and partial view of the pool and tennis court.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, and full tennis court, with large windows and outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tennis court, pool, and the side of the bungalow with minimal windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and grouped side windows
